2 visits for each group. A 30-day period with visits less than the LUPA threshold for the 
payment group is paid the national per visit amount by discipline adjusted by the 
appropriate wage index based on the site of service of the beneficiary. Such periods that 
do not meet the LUPA threshold for the payment group are paid the wage-adjusted per 
visit amount for each of the visits rendered instead of the full 30-day
